title: bupleurum longifolium var. aureum
intro: Bupleurum longifolium var. aureum is a golden-leaved variety of the Bupleurum longifolium plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally used in Asian medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum longifolium var. aureum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and gallbladder issues, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
